user.title: Set up HARadiator OSC
user.description: Configure the Radiator OSC host and ports. The Radiator OSC update is not released yet, so these defaults are intentionally easy to change later.

abort.already_configured: This Radiator host and port is already configured.

send_message.name: Send OSC message
send_message.description: Send a raw OSC message to Radiator.

address.name: OSC address
address.description: OSC address to send, for example /radiator/master/blackout.

value.name: Value
value.description: Value to send. Numbers, booleans, and strings are supported.
